page: Google Cloud Platform c4-highmem-192-lssd is a memory-optimized and storage-intensive server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 6985P-C processor. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it features 192 dedicated virtual CPUs across 96 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. The system is equipped with 1488 GB of RAM, providing approximately 7.75 GB of memory per core. It includes a massive local storage array consisting of 32 NVMe SSDs totaling 12599 GB, while lacking any dedicated GPU hardware.

Benchmark results place this instance in the top tier for multi-core CPU performance, passmark CPU score, and database operations. The Intel Xeon processor includes advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) for accelerated matrix operations. Memory bandwidth tests show top-tier read performance for both small and large blocks, although the overall Passmark memory score falls in the average range. The server also demonstrates top-tier performance in Redis SET operations, static web serving throughput, and prompt processing for large language models.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the c4-highmem-192-lssd offers high resource density by bundling massive memory capacity with extensive local NVMe SSD storage. This combination reduces the need for external storage attachments for high-throughput workloads. The instance is highly suited for large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems like Redis, high-performance computing (HPC), and heavy data processing pipelines that require rapid local read and write operations.
description: Google Cloud Platform c4-highmem-192-lssd is a high-capacity server designed for memory-intensive and storage-heavy workloads. It features 192 dedicated vCPUs from an Intel Xeon 6985P-C processor, 1488 GB of RAM, and 12599 GB of local NVMe SSD storage across 32 drives. Operating on the x86_64 architecture, the CPU supports AVX-512 and Intel AMX extensions. Benchmarks indicate top-tier multi-core CPU performance, database operations, and Redis throughput, though overall memory latency tests score in the average range. This instance is highly efficient for workloads requiring massive local storage and memory density, making it a strong fit for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, and data-intensive enterprise applications.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c4-highmem-192-lssd features 192 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 1488 GB RAM, and 12599 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, delivering top-tier database and multi-core CPU performance.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform c4-highmem-192-lssd offers 192 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 1488 GB RAM, and 12.5 TB local NVMe SSD storage for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A high-density memory and storage server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and massive local NVMe SSD capacity for enterprise databases.
bullet_points: 192 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 6985P-C processors with AVX-512 and AMX support.
1488 GB of RAM paired with 12599 GB of local NVMe SSD storage across 32 drives.
Top-tier multi-core CPU performance and database operations in benchmark testing.
Exceptional Redis SET operations and static web serving throughput.
Optimized for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, and data-intensive pipelines.
